title: leucanthemum ircutianum subsp. crassifolium
intro: Leucanthemum ircutianum subsp. crassifolium, commonly known as the Siberian daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leucanthemum ircutianum subsp. crassifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its wound-healing and antiseptic properties.
